{{ 'vendors.workflow.review.title' | translate }}

{{ 'vendors.workflow.review.hint' | translate }}

@if (vendor(); as v) {
{{ 'vendors.workflow.identity.companyNameLabel' | translate }}
{{ v.companyName }}
@if (v.contactName) {
{{ 'vendors.workflow.identity.contactNameLabel' | translate }}
{{ v.contactName }}
} @if (v.email) {
{{ 'vendors.workflow.identity.emailLabel' | translate }}
{{ v.email }}
} @if (v.phone) {
{{ 'vendors.workflow.identity.phoneLabel' | translate }}
{{ v.phone }}
} @if (addressLine()) {
{{ 'vendors.workflow.address.title' | translate }}
{{ addressLine() }}
} @if (v.paymentTerms) {
{{ 'vendors.workflow.terms.paymentTermsLabel' | translate }}
{{ v.paymentTerms }}
} @if (v.offTierVariancePct !== null) {
{{ 'vendors.workflow.terms.offTierVariancePctLabel' | translate }}
{{ v.offTierVariancePct }}%
} @if (v.notes) {
{{ 'vendors.workflow.terms.notesLabel' | translate }}
{{ v.notes }}
}
} @else {

{{ 'vendors.workflow.review.loading' | translate }}

}
